creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to daniel.engberg.lists from comment #2) I would just take some text from https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2020-24977 and look at the related links there, for example https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/libxml2/-/issues/178 Some existing entries in the vuln.xml also just use

Mitre CVE reports:

there. So, I wouldn't spend too much time on that :) mfg Tobias
